title: Stratis AI Output Block Types — v1
description: Formal contract between AI pipeline and BlockRenderer. All four AIBlockType values from shared/types.ts are defined here. Updated S1-T03-D to reconcile with shared/types.ts.

DecisionNode.description: A decision the team must make or has made. metadata.options lists choices.

SummaryBlock.description: Condensed recap of a meeting segment.

QuestionSuggestion.description: AI-generated question for the facilitator. Routed to SuggestionCardStack, not BlockRenderer. BlockRenderer renders it as a fallback only.

notes: Unknown types must not crash BlockRenderer — rendered as UnknownBlock fallback.
QuestionSuggestion is filtered out by useAiBlocks and sent to SuggestionCardStack. BlockRenderer only sees it if the caller bypasses the hook.
id and timestamp are frontend-added fields, not part of the AI output contract.
EmptyPlaceholder is a frontend-only sentinel, never emitted by the AI.
